title: Schedule Trigger not executing on localhost
symptom: The Schedule Trigger does not execute as expected on localhost, despite manual execution working fine. The user reports that the workflow never triggered over two days.
not_this_if: Schedule Trigger works in n8n cloud
Different timezone settings are not considered
root_cause: The Schedule Trigger may not account for timezone differences correctly, leading to it not firing at the expected times. If the trigger time is set without considering the local timezone, it may never execute.
fix_steps: Calculate the time difference between the local timezone and the trigger time set in n8n.
Adjust the trigger time accordingly to match the local timezone.
agent_instruction: Adjust the Schedule Trigger time based on the local timezone difference.
